MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-05-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on Petition to Approve a Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Paul E. Van Dyk, Esq. appeared with petitioner James Ahlquist, who was present as Guardian ad litem for Hannah Ahlquist.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Total Settlement - $100,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $39,031.07.
Costs - $2,422.33.

A net balance of $58,546.60 shall be deposited into the Kern, Noda, Devine and Segal Trust Account until the amount of the Medicare lien is determined and the lien is satisfied, after which the remaining balance shall be paid to Hannah Ahlquist.

Order Approving Compromise of a Disputed Claim was submitted to and signed by the Court.
